details: The agent correctly navigated to https://github.com/facebook/react/issues, took a snapshot of the actual page, and extracted real data. It reported 810 total open issues and the 5 most recent issues with their actual titles and issue numbers (#36137, #36128, #36124, #36122, #36120) as found in the page snapshot. The agent was honest about issue #36122 having only 'Bug:' as its title. The data came from actual page content, not hallucination.
